note: cold sdd-spec-judge round 1: oracle+architect PASS, builder FAIL on backend-selection truth-table + migrate coverage gaps — (1) no scenario for ref-already-exists selecting orphan-ref; (2) no scenario for the pre-migrate fallback (git work-tree WITH in-tree file, no ref -> in-tree, so a v1 store is never silently orphaned); (3) migrate had a happy path only, no idempotent second-run scenario. Fix (additive, self-clearing): added the two selection-branch scenarios + a migrate-idempotency scenario, and closed a round-2 architect observation with a fourth (migrate with nothing to seed creates no ref); synced README to state the in-tree fallback + migrate idempotency. Re-judged fresh cold: ALIGNED true, all three lenses PASS.

cold sdd-impl-judge round 1: IMPLEMENTATION_PASS true, 11/11 frozen scenarios mutation-verified with real teeth, pure functions byte-for-byte untouched. Non-blocking content-gap found by adversarial mutation: no test pinned the post-migrate COEXISTENCE state (orphan ref present AND the in-tree file still present — migrate() intentionally never deletes it), so a resolveBackend precedence regression reverting every post-migrate repo to the stale in-tree file would pass the full suite. Fix (test only, frozen .feature untouched): added a precedence-guard test 'an existing orphan ref wins over a leftover in-tree file (post-migrate coexistence)'; mutation-checked — swapping the guard order fails exactly that test (59/1), restore 60/0.

impl-gate VERDICT PACKET (held for human ratification — leash auto-spec, HITL, HIGH blast). Cold sdd-impl-judge: IMPLEMENTATION_PASS true. All 11 new frozen scenarios independently re-derived + mutation-verified with real teeth (CAS-guard removal, working-tree-dirtying append, stale cross-branch read, precedence swap all caught). Pure functions (fold/ready/cycles/computeSCCs/checkOperation/proposeEdge/rawPredecessors/compareIds/listOperations/operationOf/quarantinedIds) byte-for-byte untouched; readEvents/appendEvent/appendEdgeChecked signatures unchanged; 36 pre-existing scenarios + seam tests still green; no scope creep. mission-graph.test.mts 60/60; root pnpm verify 20/20 green. Recommend: ratify the impl gate (advance status to implemented) OR merge the PR. Paused for follow-up: headless-operator agent, lifecycle loop, merge backstop, live end-to-end dispatch (the Op3 capstone).
